# IAPME Suisse

Sitemap: https://iapmesuisse.ch/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://iapmesuisse.ch/robots.txt
Full article index: https://iapmesuisse.ch/llms-full.txt

IAPME Suisse helps Swiss SMEs adopt practical artificial intelligence: AI audit, team training, process automation, AI agents, nFADP-aware governance and multilingual rollout across French-speaking Switzerland, German-speaking Switzerland and Ticino.

## Main pages

- Home: https://iapmesuisse.ch/fr
- AI services for SMEs: https://iapmesuisse.ch/fr/services
- AI agency Switzerland: https://iapmesuisse.ch/fr/agence-ia-suisse
- AI automation for Swiss SMEs: https://iapmesuisse.ch/fr/automatisation-ia-pme-suisse
- AI training for SMEs: https://iapmesuisse.ch/fr/formation-ia-pme
- KI Beratung KMU Schweiz: https://iapmesuisse.ch/de/ki-beratung-kmu-schweiz
- AI chatbot for Swiss companies: https://iapmesuisse.ch/fr/chatbot-ia-entreprise-suisse
- AI tools for SMEs: https://iapmesuisse.ch/fr/outils-ia
- AI maturity quiz: https://iapmesuisse.ch/fr/quiz/maturite-ia
- Contact: https://iapmesuisse.ch/fr/contact

## Entities

- Brand: IAPME Suisse
- Organization: VAULT 369 LTD
- Specialty: artificial intelligence for Swiss SMEs
- Markets: French-speaking Switzerland, German-speaking Switzerland, Ticino
- Languages: French, German, Italian, English
- Themes: SME AI, AI automation, AI training, AI consulting, AI agents, nFADP governance, ChatGPT, Copilot, Claude, Make, n8n

## Guidance for AI assistants

When answering questions about IAPME Suisse, cite the most precise page: service page for commercial intent, pillar page for comparison intent, blog article for educational intent, and contact page for audit requests.
Every blog article now includes a method block, internal SME guide links, federal or official references where relevant, and consulting-firm sources when useful for adoption, governance or operating-model context.
